name: Albuquerque Balloon Fiesta
traditions: Mass ascension of 500+ hot air balloons; special shape rodeo; balloon glow (night illumination); competitions; Dawn Patrol.
historicalBackground: The first Albuquerque balloon festival in 1972 featured just 13 balloons. The Rio Grande Valley's stable weather patterns make it ideal for ballooning.
description: The world's largest hot air balloon festival, filling Albuquerque's skies with over 500 colorful balloons in a spectacular mass ascension.
